description_long: This house features a modern, multi-volume design with a combination of white and brown exterior walls, accented by sections of light stone cladding. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular and gabled sections, creating a visually dynamic layout. Large, floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the front facade, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a spacious driveway leading to a double garage, as well as landscaped areas with trees and paved walkways. The roof is primarily gabled, with each section having its own distinct pitch and orientation. The entryway is understated, with a single door and a small set of steps, blending seamlessly into the overall modern design.
description: A modern, multi-section house with white and brown walls, large windows, gabled roofs, and a double garage connected by a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, double garage, and landscaped driveway with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the garage extension, and the paved walkway wrapping around the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional large windows, stone cladding, and the full width of the house's interconnected sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the garage, more landscaping, and the continuation of the paved driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small set of steps, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
